CREATE TABLE more_data (id UInt32, number Float64);
SELECT quantileExactLow(0.5)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM more_data WHERE id < 4);
SELECT q1, q2 FROM (SELECT quantileExactLow(0.2)(number) AS q1, quantileExactLow(0.8)(number) AS q2 FROM test_data);
SELECT quantileExactLow(0.5)(number) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM more_data);
CREATE TABLE combined_data AS SELECT number FROM test_data UNION ALL SELECT number FROM more_data;
SELECT quantileExactLow(0.5)(number) FROM combined_data WHERE number > 0.4;
SELECT quantileExactLow(0.5)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM combined_data ORDER BY number DESC);
